sentiment: Obscured code reveals the quiet patterns we long to understand in ourselves.

stories.title: The 29th International Obfuscated C Code Contest (IOCCC) 2025 Winners
stories.summary: Winning entries that hide meaning in plain sight, revealing what code can say when it stops trying to be clear.

stories.title: I design with Claude more than Figma now
stories.summary: A reflection on how the tools we shape begin to shape us — and where craft goes when the making changes hands.

stories.title: Valve P2P networking broken for more than 2 months
stories.summary: Silence in the pipes — what it means when the connections we depend on quietly fail and no one notices.
